title: Server returns 500 Internal Server Error instead of 400 Bad Request while adding a new pet with a string value in category "id" field
author: Anastasia Kozub
actual result:
**Actual Result:** The server fails to handle a string passed in the "id" field inside the "category" object and crashes with a 500 Internal Server Error code and a message: 
{ "code": 500, 
"type": "unknown", 
"message": "something bad happened" }

**Expected Result:** 

* Status Code: 400 Bad Request
* Pet is not created 
* Response body contains validation error message indicating that "id" field for "category" field must be an integer

title: Server returns 200 OK instead of 400 Bad Request while updating a pet with a value not included in enum list in "status" field
author: Anastasia Kozub
actual result:
**Actual Result:** The server successfully processes the update request and returns a 200 OK status code when an invalid string value ("flying") that is not defined in the status enum list is passed in the "status" field: 
{ "id": 205, 
"category": { "id": 1, "name": "cats" }, 
"name": "InvalidStatusPet", 
"photoUrls": [ "[https://plus.unsplash.com/premium_photo-1667030474693-6d0632f97029?q=80&w=687&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D](https://plus.unsplash.com/premium_photo-1667030474693-6d0632f97029?q=80&w=687&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D)" ], 
"tags": [ { "id": 1, "name": "test" } ], 
"status": "flying" }

**Expected Result:** 

* Status Code: 400 Bad Request 
* Pet is not updated 
* Response body contains validation error indicating that "status" field value must match one of the allowed enum values (available, pending, sold)
